title: Unclogging the model pipes: LTX-2, Nova Canvas, and Mistral
summary:
A day of fixing pipes and rerouting traffic to get LTX-2, Nova Canvas, and Mistral back to full speed.

Sometimes the infrastructure fights back. We fixed a Cloudflare routing issue and added retry logic for LTX-2 video generation, swapped the Bedrock SDK HTTP handler to get Nova Canvas playing nice with Workers, and rerouted Mistral Small to a new Azure Foundry deployment to bypass gateway timeouts. All three are back online and fast.

Upstream providers (especially Grok) are notoriously picky about regex contracts for message names. We added a sanitization layer to catch malformed metadata before it turns into a 500 error.

On the frontend, API key management modals now match the dashboard's blue palette. Under the hood, we rolled out a new fetchUpstream helper that propagates the exact upstream URL when a backend fails, saving us from guessing which model server is having a bad day.
